title: ignition bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.22.0-1.0.1]
- Remove sgdisk requirement and create symbolic link to sgdisk [Orabug: 37470782]

[2.22.0-1]
- spec: new upstream version 2.22.0

[2.21.0-5]
- Fix TMT prepare plans

[2.21.0-4]
- Add initial TMT Gating Test

[2.21.0-3]
- Resolves: #RHEL-85233
full_text:
